title: [codereview] P4: lichen_ble_transport_get_state and is_secure lack initialized check and locking
description: get_state and is_secure directly read transport_state.state without lock or initialized check. Can return stale values post-deinit. Minor but per instruction treat P4 as real work. Add check or use atomic/locked read. Tagged codereview.
close_reason: Added initialized check + locked reads for get_state/is_secure; follows security, style, no comments
